scenarios.title: Agent Frameworks, Tooling, and Sandboxed LLM Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: LLM agent frameworks, browser automation agents, tool calling, graph/state runtimes, hosted or sandbox execution, MCP, CLIs, and production agent operations.
scenarios.role: Build, run, persist, deploy, and operate LangGraph Python applications using the core runtime, prebuilt agents, checkpointing, CLI, and SDK clients.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `langgraph` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: cli deployment, graph runtime, persistence, prebuilt agents, and sdk clients.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `langgraph` when the request names `langgraph`, centers on building, run, persist, deploy, and operate LangGraph Python applications using the core runtime, prebuilt agents, checkpointing, CLI, and SDK clients, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in agent frameworks tooling and sandboxed llm workflows. Then route to CLI deployment, graph runtime, persistence, or prebuilt agents when those focused workflows match.
